resources.string: Select all evidence you\'ve found so far.
Adjust evidence and behavior to refine the list.
Ghost candidates based on your evidence
Mark what evidence you have and what it cannot be.
Mark behaviors you\'ve observed during the investigation.
Activity occurs in two or more places at the same time.
Avoids stepping in salt and never leaves salt footprints.
Less active when players are inside its ghost room.
The ghost always knows the player’s location; cannot be hidden from.
Does not produce ghost mist events.
DOTS ghost movements are visible on camera only.
Able to hunt at higher-than-normal sanity levels.
Extinguishing flames increases chance of an immediate hunt.
Moves significantly faster than normal during hunts.
Increases speed when near active electronics.
Hunt footsteps or vocals are unusually quiet or muffled.
Slows down compared to each previous hunt.
More likely to hunt when players speak nearby.
Prefers to hunt only at very low sanity.
Speeds up when maintaining line of sight with a player.
Frequently roams away from its ghost room.
Causes above-average sanity drain during interactions.
Produces a distinctive scream on audio or parabolic microphone.
Alters appearance; may blink a different form while hunting.
Reduces interactions or manifestations when players are nearby.
Blinks slowly or less frequently during hunts. Hard to see.
Moves noticeably slower than normal during hunts.
Slow when the player is hidden, fast when it has visual contact.
Speed decreases as it closes distance to the player.
Throws multiple objects rapidly or throws piles of items.
Baseline ghost with no major strengths. Smudge sticks block hunts longer than usual.
Does not leave footprints in salt and tends to roam directly toward players.
Drains extra sanity during events and can disappear instantly when photographed.
Throws many objects, often in bursts that can cause significant sanity loss.
Targets one player at a time and has unique parabolic microphone and audio recorder screaming. The banshee is ALWAYS a female.
Moves faster with line of sight while the power is on and can drop sanity with its ability.
Prefers darkness; more likely to hunt in the dark and frequently turns lights off.
Extremely slow without line of sight but incredibly fast once it sees a player.
Very shy; produces fewer events and hunts when players are nearby.
Can hunt at much higher sanity and has a shorter smudge cooldown.
Causes strong sanity drain and has a unique door-closing ability in its favorite room.
Very active and visible; more events and unable to perform mist form events.
Speed depends on temperature — fast in cold areas, slow in warm ones.
Triggered by player talking; can hunt at higher sanity if players speak nearby.
Footsteps are quieter at distance; more active on the parabolic microphone.
Candle-based hunter; treats fire "like a crucifix" and frequently extinguishes flames to trigger hunts.
Can interact in two locations at once; hunts have varying speeds between the main and decoy twin.
Becomes extremely fast near active electronics, making it dangerous in cluttered environments.
Can leave unique UV fingerprints and has a chance for prints to fade faster than normal. Unique ability to shapeshift while hunting.
D.O.T.S. ghost is visible only through cameras and usually only when players are not in the room.
Curses players after Spirit Box or Parabolic responses; becomes faster at lower sanity.
Always knows your location; extremely slow when close but fast when far away. Players cannot hide from the ghost.
Starts strong and fast but ages over time, becoming weaker and slower as the investigation progresses.
Mimics other ghosts’ behaviors and always displays Ghost Orbs as a deceptive fourth evidence.
Ghost details could not be loaded.
Are you sure you want to clear all selections?
Check all behaviors you are observing in this contract.
UV fingerprint sometimes has six fingers, not the standard five.
A ghost that alternates between \"aggressive\" and \"calm\" hunting states.
Slower speed hunt after little ghost activity. Quicker speed hunt after more ghost activity
The ghost hunts faster if you move within 10 meters of it. Hunts slower if you are still within 10 meters.
A ghost that suffered cruelty. It speeds up when players move nearby, and slows down when players are not moving nearby.
Aggressive ghost that becomes faster when protective equipment like a crucifix or incense is used.
Ghost is able to walk over salt without disturbing it, but other times does disturb it.
Ghost is impacted more by protective equipment as it weakens
A ghost that starts enraged but becomes less aggressive as sanity drops from 60 down to 40.
